data.biography:
John Randolph 'Jack' Webb (also known by the pen name John Randolph; April 2, 1920 – December 23, 1982) was an American actor, television producer, director, and screenwriter, who is most famous for his role as Sergeant Joe Friday in the radio and television series Dragnet. He was also the founder of his own production company, Mark VII Limited.

Born in Santa Monica, California, Webb grew up in the Bunker Hill section of Los Angeles as the child of a single mother after his father left home before he was born. During World War II, Webb enlisted in the United States Army Air Forces, but he "washed out" of flight training and was granted a hardship discharge to care for his family.  Following his discharge, he moved to San Francisco, where a wartime shortage of announcers led to a temporary appointment to his own half-hour comedy radio show on ABC's KGO Radio in 1946. By 1949 he had abandoned comedy for drama, and starred in numerous radio shows until finding success in film and television in the late 1950s.

Webb had a featured role as a crime lab technician in the 1948 film He Walked by Night, a thinly-fictionalized recounting of the 1946 Walker crime spree. This experience gave Webb the idea for Dragnet: a recurring series based on real cases from LAPD police files, featuring authentic depictions of the modern police detective, including methods, mannerisms, and technical language. Following the success of Dragnet, Webb appeared in numerous television shows and specials, including the well-known 1972 series Emergency!

During his work on a revival of Dragnet in 1982, Webb suffered a heart attack and died at the age of 62. His funeral was given full police honors, and then LAPD Chief Daryl Gates retired the badge number 714 used by Webb's Joe Friday of Dragnet fame.
data.name: Jack Webb

data.biography: John Randolph Webb (Santa Monica, Califòrnia, 2 d’abril de 1920 - West Hollywood, Califòrnia, 23 de desembre de 1982) va ser un actor, productor de televisió, director i guionista nord-americà, més famós pel seu paper de Joe Friday a la franquícia Dragnet, que va crear. També va ser el fundador de la seva pròpia productora, Mark VII Limited.
约翰·伦道夫·杰克·韦伯，也以笔名约翰·伦道夫而闻名，是一位美国演员、电视制片人、导演和编剧，他最出名的是他在广播和电视连续剧《拖网》中饰演乔·星期五中士。他还是自己的制作公司Mark VII Limited的创始人。
data.name: 杰克·韦伯

data.biography: 約翰·倫道夫·傑克·韋伯，也以筆名約翰·倫道夫而聞名，是一位美國演員、電視製片人、導演和編劇，他最出名的是他在廣播和電視聯續劇《拖網》中飾演喬·星期五中士。他還是自己的製作公司 Mark VII Limited 的創始人。

data.biography: Michael John Whitehall (born 12 April 1940) is a British producer, talent agent, television personality and author. He is a former theatrical agent who went on to form two production companies, Havahall Pictures (with Nigel Havers) in 1988, and Whitehall Films in 1998. He has represented Colin Firth and Dame Judi Dench. He is the father of comedian Jack Whitehall.
data.name: Michael Whitehall

data.biography: Jay Arlen Jones (born March 8, 1954) is an American film and television actor, born in Los Angeles, California, and active since the early 1980s. His most recognized role is that of Occam, the African-American slave enlisted as a Patriot fighter by his master, in the Revolutionary War epic The Patriot (2000). After portraying Leon in Eight Legged Freaks (2001), he participated in the short film Nines and the television film The Least Among You (2009), but has not appeared onscreen since.
data.name: Jay Arlen Jones

data.biography:
Jay Mohr (born Jon Ferguson Mohr, August 23, 1970) is an American actor, comedian and radio host. He is known for his roles as film producer Peter Dragon in the TV comedy series Action, Professor Rick Payne in the TV series Ghost Whisperer (2006–2008), the title role in the CBS sitcom Gary Unmarried (2008–2010), as a featured cast member on the sketch comedy show Saturday Night Live (1993–1995), and as the back-stabbing sports agent Bob Sugar in Jerry Maguire (1996).

Since making his feature film debut with Jerry Maguire, he has appeared in films such as Suicide Kings (1997), Picture Perfect (1997), Paulie (1998), Mafia! (1998), Small Soldiers (1998), Go (1999), Cherry Falls (2000), The Adventures of Pluto Nash (2002), Are We There Yet? (2005), Street Kings (2008), Hereafter (2010) and The Incredible Burt Wonderstone (2013).
data.name: Jay Mohr

data.biography:
杰伊·莫尔（Jay Mohr，1970年8月23日出生于乔恩·弗格森·莫尔）是美国演员、喜剧演员和电台主持人。他因在电视喜剧系列《行动》中饰演电影制片人彼得·龙、在电视连续剧《鬼语者》（2006-2008）中饰演里克·佩恩教授、在哥伦比亚广播公司情景喜剧《加里未婚》（2008-2010）中担任主角、在小品喜剧节目《周六夜现场》（1993-1995）中担任特色演员，以及在杰里·马奎尔（1996）中饰演背刺体育经纪人鲍勃·苏格。

自从与杰里·马奎尔（Jerry Maguire）一起首次亮相故事片以来，他出演了《自杀之王》（1997）、《完美画面》（1997）、《保利》（1998）、《黑手党！（1998）、《小兵》（1998）、《围棋》（1999）、《樱桃瀑布》（2000）、《冥王星纳什历险记》（2002）、《我们还在那里吗？（2005 年）、街头之王 （2008 年）、此后 （2010 年）和不可思议的伯特神奇石 （2013 年）。
data.name: 杰伊·摩尔

data.biography:
傑伊·莫爾（傑伊·摩爾，1970 年 8 月 23 日出生於喬恩·弗格森·莫爾）是美國演員、喜劇演員和電台主持人。他因在電視喜劇系列《行動》中飾演電影製片人彼得·龍、在電視聯續劇《鬼語者》（2006 - 2008）中飾演里克·佩恩教授、在哥倫比亞廣播公司情景喜劇《加里未婚》（2008 - 2010）中擔任主角、在小品喜劇節目《週六夜現場》（1993 - 1995）中擔任特色演員，以及在傑里·馬奎爾（1996）中飾演背刺體育經紀人鮑勃·蘇格。

自從與傑里·馬奎爾（Jerry Maguire）一起首次亮相故事片以來，他出演了《自殺之王》（1997）、《完美畫面》（1997）、《保利》（1998）、《黑手黨！（1998）、《小兵》（1998）、《圍棋》（1999）、《櫻桃瀑布》（2000）、《冥王星納什歷險記》（2002）、《我們還在那裏嗎？（2005 年）、街頭之王 （2008 年）、此後 （2010 年）和不可思議的伯特神奇石 （2013 年）。
data.name: 傑伊·摩爾

data.biography:
Lee Lu-da (Korean: 이루다; born March 6, 1997), better known by the mononym Luda, is a South Korean singer. She debuted as a member of South Korean-Chinese girl group WJSN under Starship and Yuehua Entertainment in 2016.

On March 3, 2023, Starship Entertainment announced Luda chosen not to renew her contract with the label however it wasn't explicitly stated if she had left the group.
data.name: Luda
